title: Ulavuthurai
desc: Vasanth Periyasamy, a naval officer, is assigned to investigate the mysterious deaths at the sea. To protect his family, he assumes the identity of a car driver.

title: Sathan Sollai Thattathey
desc: Murthy, Gopinath and Sekar, three friends, unintentionally fall for the same girl, Chitra. However, their lives unexpectedly change when they accidentally release a genie from an antique violin.

title: Aararo Aariraro
desc: A woman is admitted to a psychiatric institution, where she grows close to Babu, a caretaker. However, he is later compelled to marry her after she reveals her pregnancy.

title: Ashokavanam
desc: When a stalker attacks Mohan and his family, their close friend Inspector Selvam steps in to help them deal with the situation.
